summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Toborzó CRM system completed. All backend APIs (24 tests) passed. Frontend testing verified: Admin/Recruiter login, Dashboard with KPIs and charts, Projects list and detail with Kanban pipeline, Notifications page, FormSettingsDialog (Select.Item fix verified), Google Sheets integration, Dark mode toggle, and role-based access control for Trials tab.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: 1) Admin/Recruiter authentication with role-based access, 2) Dashboard with KPI cards and charts, 3) Projects with Kanban pipeline (4 status columns), 4) Notifications page, 5) FormSettingsDialog opens without errors (Select.Item fix verified), 6) Google Sheets integration working (14 rows found in test sheet), 7) Dark mode toggle working, 8) Trials tab: Admin can create trials, Recruiter has read-only access. The app is in Hungarian language.

dashboard.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows KPI cards (Összes dolgozó, status counts), pie chart, recruiter performance table, monthly trend chart

projects.projects_list: PASS - Shows 2 projects (Teszt Projekt - Értesítés, Hantech ZRt.)
projects.project_detail: PASS - Shows Kanban pipeline with 4 columns (Próbára vár, Próba megbeszélve, Dolgozik, Tiltólista)
projects.add_worker_to_project: PASS - Dialog opens with status dropdown, position selection (mandatory), worker search

google_sheets_integration.test_connection: PASS - Connected to test sheet, found 14 rows with headers (Időbélyeg, Teljes Név, etc.)

dark_mode.toggle: PASS - Dark mode applied correctly with 'dark' class on html element
